sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96219" key="stalagmiai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σταλαγ-μιαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96219.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">as measured by the water-clock</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὥρα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">K.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς λεπτομερεῖς ἡμέρας καὶ ς. ὥρας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:274:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">274.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
